layout.name: window-open
layout.rationale: Crisp window spawn aligns with observed OS-like feel; tokenized.

layout.name: window-close
layout.rationale: Fast close; closure bias to ease-in for natural decay.

layout.name: resize-settle
layout.rationale: Immediate drag with short settle to avoid jank.

layout.name: focus-ring-fade
layout.rationale: Subtle focus feedback; keep minimal for accessibility.

keyboard.name: cycle-windows-next
keyboard.rationale: OS-like task switching across open windows.

keyboard.name: cycle-windows-prev
keyboard.rationale: Reverse traversal for parity and ergonomics.

keyboard.name: move-window
keyboard.rationale: Power-user control; 10px increments to avoid layout jitter.

keyboard.name: resize-window
keyboard.rationale: Direct resize control with short settle.

keyboard.name: toggle-recipe-book
keyboard.rationale: Quick access to a primary app window; consistent with our hotkeys.

motion.name: minimize-restore
motion.rationale: Slightly longer to signal state change without dragging focus.

motion.name: context-menu
motion.rationale: Crisp, readable context open consistent with OS feel.

micro.name: press-feedback
micro.rationale: Small scale/shadow change without layout shift.

a11y.name: reduced-motion
a11y.rationale: Respect user preference to reduce motion.

plan.notes: Introduce WindowShell and motion tokens; add keyboard focus cycling and persistence.
